notes: Review-backed marketing themes. Each draws evidence from one or more operational themes (source_themes). 'context_theme' links to a property-context gating theme (property_context.json) so the marketing insight is gated: e.g. 'Quiet atmosphere' maps to 'quiet_community', which is caution-only for student housing. Confidence labels use the deterministic thresholds below. suggested_use is passed through the property-context gating utility before it is emitted.

confidence_thresholds.notes: Confidence is based on positive mention count and the positive share of mentions for the source themes. Three labels only.

not_recommended.description: Negative mentions outnumber positive, or no positive evidence.

themes.label: Friendly staff
themes.suggested_use: Feature resident praise for the on-site team in social proof and website content.

themes.label: Responsive maintenance
themes.suggested_use: Highlight responsive maintenance in website content and tour talking points.

themes.label: Clean community
themes.suggested_use: Use clean, well-kept community feedback in photos and captions.

themes.label: Convenient location
themes.suggested_use: Reinforce location convenience in neighborhood content.

themes.label: Quiet atmosphere
themes.suggested_use: Feature the quiet, peaceful atmosphere in listings.

themes.label: Strong amenities
themes.suggested_use: Showcase amenity satisfaction in the amenities page and photo gallery.

themes.label: Spacious homes
themes.suggested_use: Emphasize spacious floor plans where residents mention space.

themes.label: Pet friendliness
themes.suggested_use: Highlight pet-friendly features and resident pet feedback.

themes.label: Safety
themes.suggested_use: Reference resident sense of safety carefully and only when consistently positive.

themes.label: Community atmosphere
themes.suggested_use: Feature community and neighbor feedback in lifestyle content.

themes.label: Move-in experience
themes.suggested_use: Use smooth move-in stories in the leasing journey content.
